The '''Sarnikken Asteroid Belt''' was a group of [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]]. Its asteroids contained a wealth of heavy metals, and [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations struggled for control of them. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] tried to take control of the mines but Imperial officials would often disappear. Larger [[Starship/Legends|ships]] had difficulty negotiating the dense [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]]. The Empire attempted to maintain a blockade outside the field but low numbers of ships made this difficult.<ref name="CP" />

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] purchased raw materials for its [[Starship/Legends|ships]] from the [[Miner/Legends|miners]]. The [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] of [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] would often escort the heavily laden Rebel [[Transport/Legends|transports]]. [[Exogorth/Legends|Space slugs]] and [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] were known to inhabit the many asteroids in the Sarnikken belt.<ref name="CP" />
